evolution_from_requirement: when leveled up with during the day or when leveled up with during the night or when leveled up with during the dusk

name: Aerodactyl
description: A Pokemon that roamed the skies in the dinosaur era. Its teeth are like saw blades.

name: Carbink
description: Born from the temperatures and pressures deep underground, it fires beams from the stone in its head.

name: Klawf
description: Klawf hangs upside-down from cliffs, waiting for prey. But Klawf cant remain in this position for long because its blood rushes to its head.

name: Lunatone
description: LUNATONE was discovered at a location where a meteorite fell. As a result, some people theorize that this POKeMON came from space. However, no one has been able to prove this theory so far.

name: Solrock
description: SOLROCK is a new species of POKeMON that is said to have fallen from space. It floats in air and moves silently. In battle, this POKeMON releases intensely bright light.

name: Minior
description: Originally making its home in the ozone layer, it hurtles to the ground when the shell enclosing its body grows too heavy.

name: Minior Core Revealed
description: Although its outer shell is uncommonly durable, the shock of falling to the ground smashes the shell to smithereens.

name: Stonjourner
description: It stands in grasslands, watching the suns descent from zenith to horizon. This Pokemon has a talent for delivering dynamic kicks.

name: Aron
description: This POKeMON has a body of steel. To make its body, ARON feeds on iron ore that it digs from mountains. Occasionally, it causes major trouble by eating bridges and rails.

name: Lairon
description: LAIRON tempers its steel body by drinking highly nutritious mineral springwater until it is bloated. This POKeMON makes its nest close to springs of delicious water.

name: Aggron
description: AGGRON claims an entire mountain as its own territory. It mercilessly beats up anything that violates its environment. This POKeMON vigilantly patrols its territory at all times.

name: Beldum
description: It converses with others by using magnetic pulses. In a swarm, they move in perfect unison.

name: Metang
description: When two BELDUM fuse together, METANG is formed. The brains of the BELDUM are joined by a magnetic nervous system. By linking its brains magnetically, this POKeMON generates strong psychokinetic power.

name: Metagross
description: It analyzes its opponents with more accuracy than a supercomputer, which enables it to calmly back them into a corner.

name: Honedge
description: Apparently this Pokemon is born when a departed spirit inhabits a sword. It attaches itself to people and drinks their life force.

name: Doublade
description: When Honedge evolves, it divides into two swords, which cooperate via telepathy to coordinate attacks and slash their enemies to ribbons.

name: Aegislash Shield
description: Apparently, it can detect the innate qualities of leadership. According to legend, whoever it recognizes is destined to become king.

name: Aegislash Sword
description: Apparently, it can detect the innate qualities of leadership. According to legend, whoever it recognizes is destined to become king.

name: Klink
description: The two minigears that mesh together are predetermined. Each will rebound from other minigears without meshing.

name: Klang
description: By changing the direction in which it rotates, it communicates its feelings to others. When angry, it rotates faster.

name: Klinklang
description: Its red core functions as an energy tank. It fires the charged energy through its spikes into an area.

name: Bronzor
description: Implements shaped like it were discovered in ancient tombs. It is unknown if they are related.

name: Bronzong
description: One caused a news sensation when it was dug up at a construction site after a 2,000-year sleep.

name: Cufant
description: It digs up the ground with its trunk. Its also very strong, being able to carry loads of over five tons without any problem at all.

name: Copperajah
description: They came over from another region long ago and worked together with humans. Their green skin is resistant to water.

name: Gimmighoul Chest
description: It lives inside an old treasure chest. Sometimes it gets left in shop corners since no one realizes it’s actually a Pokémon.

name: Gimmighoul Roaming
description: It lives inside an old treasure chest. Sometimes it gets left in shop corners since no one realizes it’s actually a Pokémon.

name: Gholdengo
description: Its body seems to be made up of 1,000 coins. This Pokemon gets along well with others and is quick to make friends with anybody.

name: Meowth Cold Climate
description: It washes its face regularly to keep the coin on its forehead spotless. It doesn’t get along with Galarian Meowth.

name: Perrserker
description: What appears to be an iron helmet is actually hardened hair. This Pokemon lives for the thrill of battle.

name: Onix
description: As it grows, the stone portions of its body harden to become similar to a diamond, but colored black.

evolves_to_details.steelix: when traded holding a Metal Coat

name: Steelix
description: It is thought its body transformed as a result of iron accumulating internally from swallowing soil.
evolution_from_requirement: when traded holding a Metal Coat

name: Varoom
description: It is said that this Pokemon was born when an unknown poison Pokemon entered and inspirited an engine left at a scrap-processing factory.

name: Revavroom
description: It creates a gas out of poison and minerals from rocks. It then detonates the gas in its cylindersnow numbering eightto generate energy.

name: Duraludon
description: Its body resembles polished metal, and its both lightweight and strong. The only drawback is that it rusts easily.

name: Archaludon
description: It gathers static electricity from its surroundings. The beams it launches when down on all fours are tremendously powerful.

name: Klefki
description: These key collectors threaten any attackers by fiercely jingling their keys at them.

name: Mawile
description: MAWHILEs huge jaws are actually steel horns that have been transformed. Its docile-looking face serves to lull its foe into letting down its guard. When the foe least expects it, MAWHILE chomps it with its gaping jaws.

name: Orthworm
description: When attacked, this Pokemon will wield the tendrils on its body like fists and pelt the opponent with a storm of punches.

name: Skarmory
description: Its sturdy wings look heavy, but they are actually hollow and light, allowing it to fly freely in the sky.

name: Azurill
description: A Pokemon that lives by water. It moves quickly on land by bouncing on its big tail.

evolves_to_details.marill: when leveled up with high friendship

name: Marill
description: The tip of its tail, which con tains oil that is lighter than wa ter, lets it swim without drowning.
evolution_from_requirement: when leveled up with high friendship

name: Azumarill
description: It lives in water virtually all day long. Its body color and pattern act as camouflage that makes it tough for enemies to spot in water.

name: Horsea
description: Known to shoot down flying bugs with precision blasts of ink from the surface of the water.

name: Seadra
description: Capable of swim ming backwards by rapidly flapping its wing-like pectoral fins and stout tail.

evolves_to_details.kingdra: when traded holding a Dragon Scale

name: Kingdra
description: It lives in caves on the seafloor and creates giant whirlpools every time it moves.
evolution_from_requirement: when traded holding a Dragon Scale

name: Lotad
description: LOTAD live in ponds and lakes, where they float on the surface. It grows weak if its broad leaf dies. On rare occasions, this POKeMON travels on land in search of clean water.

name: Lombre
description: LOMBRE is nocturnal - it will get active after dusk. It is also a mischief-maker. When this POKeMON spots anglers, it tugs on their fishing lines from beneath the surface and enjoys their consternation.

name: Ludicolo
description: LUDICOLO begins dancing as soon as it hears cheerful, festive music. This POKeMON is said to appear when it hears the singing of children on hiking outings.

name: Tympole
description: They warn others of danger by vibrating their cheeks to create a high-pitched sound.

name: Palpitoad
description: When they vibrate the bumps on their heads, they can make waves in water or earthquake-like vibrations on land.

name: Seismitoad
description: They shoot paralyzing liquid from their head bumps. They use vibration to hurt their opponents.

name: Poliwag
description: Its newly grown legs prevent it from running. It appears to prefer swimming than trying to stand.

name: Poliwhirl
description: Capable of living in or out of water. When out of water, it sweats to keep its body slimy.

evolves_to_details.politoed: when traded holding a Kings Rock

name: Poliwrath
description: An adept swimmer at both the front crawl and breast stroke. Easily overtakes the best human swimmers.

name: Politoed
description: If POLIWAG and POLIWHIRL hear its echoing cry, they respond by gather ing from far and wide.
evolution_from_requirement: when traded holding a Kings Rock

name: Arrokuda
description: If it sees any movement around it, this Pokemon charges for it straightaway, leading with its sharply pointed jaw. Its very proud of that jaw.

name: Barraskewda
description: This Pokemon has a jaw thats as sharp as a spear and as strong as steel. Apparently Barraskewdas flesh is surprisingly tasty, too.

name: Barboach
description: It coats its entire body with a slimy fluid so it can squirm and slip away if grabbed.

name: Whiscash
description: WHISCASH is extremely territorial. Just one of these POKeMON will claim a large pond as its exclusive territory. If a foe approaches it, it thrashes about and triggers a massive earthquake.

name: Buizel
description: It has a flotation sac that is like an inflatable collar. It floats on water with its head out.

name: Floatzel
description: It floats using its well-developed flotation sac. It assists in the rescues of drowning people.

name: Carvanha
description: CARVANHAs strongly developed jaws and its sharply pointed fangs pack the destructive power to rip out boat hulls. Many boats have been attacked and sunk by this POKeMON.

name: Sharpedo
description: Nicknamed the bully of the sea, SHARPEDO is widely feared. Its cruel fangs grow back immediately if they snap off. Just one of these POKeMON can thoroughly tear apart a supertanker.

name: Chewtle
description: Apparently the itch of its teething impels it to snap its jaws at anything in front of it.

name: Drednaw
description: With jaws that can shear through steel rods, this highly aggressive Pokemon chomps down on its unfortunate prey.

name: Chinchou
description: Chinchou blink their shining antennae at one another to claim their respective turf.

name: Lanturn
description: The light it emits is so bright that it can illuminate the sea's surface from a depth of over three miles.

name: Clauncher
description: They knock down flying prey by firing compressed water from their massive claws like shooting a pistol.

name: Clawitzer
description: Their enormous claws launch cannonballs of water powerful enough to pierce tanker hulls.

name: Corphish
description: CORPHISH were originally foreign POKeMON that were imported as pets. They eventually turned up in the wild. This POKeMON is very hardy and has greatly increased its population.

name: Crawdaunt
description: CRAWDAUNT has an extremely violent nature that compels it to challenge other living things to battle. Other life-forms refuse to live in ponds inhabited by this POKeMON, making them desolate places.

name: Dewpider
description: It crawls onto the land in search of food. Its water bubble allows it to breathe and protects its soft head.

name: Araquanid
description: It delivers headbutts with the water bubble on its head. Small Pokemon get sucked into the bubble, where they drown.

name: Ducklett
description: These bird Pokemon are excellent divers. They swim around in the water eating their favorite food--peat moss.

name: Swanna
description: Swanna start to dance at dusk. The one dancing in the middle is the leader of the flock.

name: Feebas
description: FEEBASs fins are ragged and tattered from the start of its life. Because of its shoddy appearance, this POKeMON is largely ignored. It is capable of living in both the sea and in rivers.

evolves_to_details.milotic: when traded holding a Prism Scale

name: Milotic
description: MILOTIC is said to be the most beautiful of all the POKeMON. It has the power to becalm such emotions as anger and hostility to quell bitter feuding.
evolution_from_requirement: when traded holding a Prism Scale

name: Finizen
description: It likes playing with others of its kind using the water ring on its tail. It uses ultrasonic waves to sense the emotions of other living creatures.

name: Palafin Zero
description: Its physical capabilities are no different than a Finizen’s, but when its allies are in danger, it transforms and powers itself up.

name: Palafin Hero
description: Its physical capabilities are no different than a Finizen’s, but when its allies are in danger, it transforms and powers itself up.

name: Finneon
description: The line running down its side can store sunlight. It shines vividly at night.

name: Lumineon
description: It lives on the deep-sea floor. It attracts prey by flashing the patterns on its four tail fins.

name: Frillish
description: With its thin, veil-like arms wrapped around the body of its opponent, it sinks to the ocean floor.

name: Jellicent
description: The fate of the ships and crew that wander into Jellicents habitat: all sunken, all lost, all vanished.

name: Goldeen
description: Its tail fin billows like an elegant ballroom dress, giving it the nickname of the Water Queen.

name: Seaking
description: In the autumn spawning season, they can be seen swimming powerfully up rivers and creeks.

name: Krabby
description: Its pincers are not only powerful weapons, they are used for balance when walking sideways.

name: Kingler
description: The large pincer has 10000 hp of crushing power. However, its huge size makes it unwieldy to use.

name: Magikarp
description: In the distant past, it was somewhat stronger than the horribly weak descendants that exist today.

name: Gyarados
description: Once it begins to rampage, a GYARADOS will burn everything down, even in a harsh storm.

name: Mantyke
description: A friendly Pokemon that captures the subtle flows of seawater using its two antennae.

evolves_to_details.mantine: when leveled up with with Remoraid in the party

name: Mantine
description: As it majestically swims, it doesn't care if REMORAID attach to it for scavenging its leftovers.
evolution_from_requirement: when leveled up with with Remoraid in the party

name: Panpour
description: The water stored inside the tuft on its head is full of nutrients. Plants that receive its water grow large.

name: Simipour
description: The tuft on its head holds water. When the level runs low, it replenishes the tuft by siphoning up water with its tail.

name: Psyduck
description: While lulling its enemies with its vacant look, this wily POKeMON will use psychokinetic powers.

name: Golduck
description: Often seen swim ming elegantly by lake shores. It is often mistaken for the Japanese monster, Kappa.

name: Remoraid
description: It has superb ac curacy. The water it shoots out can strike even moving prey from more than 300 feet.

name: Octillery
description: It traps enemies with its suction- cupped tentacles then smashes them with its rock-hard head.

name: Seel
description: The protruding horn on its head is very hard. It is used for bashing through thick ice.

name: Dewgong
description: Stores thermal energy in its body. Swims at a steady 8 knots even in intensely cold waters.

name: Shellder
description: Its hard shell repels any kind of attack. It is vulnerable only when its shell is open.

name: Cloyster
description: When attacked, it launches its horns in quick volleys. Its innards have never been seen.

name: Shellos
description: Its colors and shapes differ from region to region. In the Sinnoh region, two types are confirmed.

name: Gastrodon
description: It has a pliable body without any bones. If any part of its body is torn off, it grows right back.

name: Staryu
description: If its body is torn, it can grow back if the red core remains. The core flashes at midnight.

name: Starmie
description: Its central core glows with the seven colors of the rainbow. Some people value the core as a gem.

name: Tentacool
description: Drifts in shallow seas. Anglers who hook them by accident are often punished by its stinging acid.

name: Tentacruel
description: The tentacles are normally kept short. On hunts, they are extended to ensnare and immobilize prey.

name: Tirtouga
description: Restored from a fossil, this Pokemon can dive to depths beyond half a mile.

name: Carracosta
description: They can live both in the ocean and on land. A slap from one of them is enough to open a hole in the bottom of a tanker.

name: Wailmer
description: WAILMERs nostrils are located above its eyes. This playful POKeMON loves to startle people by forcefully snorting out seawater it stores inside its body out of its nostrils.

name: Wailord
description: WAILORD is the largest of all identified POKeMON up to now. This giant POKeMON swims languorously in the vast open sea, eating massive amounts of food at once with its enormous mouth.

name: Wiglett
description: This Pokemon can pick up the scent of a Veluza just over 65 feet away and will hide itself in the sand.

name: Wugtrio
description: It has a vicious temperament, contrary to what its appearance may suggest. It wraps its long bodies around prey, then drags the prey into its den.

name: Wingull
description: WINGULL has the habit of carrying prey and valuables in its beak and hiding them in all sorts of locations. This POKeMON rides the winds and flies as if it were skating across the sky.

name: Pelipper
description: It is a messenger of the skies, carrying small Pokemon and eggs to safety in its bill.

name: Wooper
description: This POKeMON lives in cold water. It will leave the water to search for food when it gets cold outside.

name: Quagsire
description: This carefree POKeMON has an easy-going nature. While swimming, it always bumps into boat hulls.

name: Clamperl
description: CLAMPERLs sturdy shell is not only good for protection - it is also used for clamping and catching prey. A fully grown CLAMPERLs shell will be scored with nicks and scratches all over.

evolves_to_details.gorebyss: when traded holding a Deep Sea Scale
evolves_to_details.huntail: when traded holding a Deep Sea Tooth

name: Huntail
description: HUNTAILs presence went unnoticed by people for a long time because it lives at extreme depths in the sea. This POKeMONs eyes can see clearly even in the murky dark depths of the ocean.
evolution_from_requirement: when traded holding a Deep Sea Tooth

name: Gorebyss
description: GOREBYSS lives in the southern seas at extreme depths. Its body is built to withstand the enormous pressure of water at incredible depths. Because of this, this POKeMONs body is unharmed by ordinary attacks.
evolution_from_requirement: when traded holding a Deep Sea Scale

name: Slowpoke
description: Incredibly slow and dopey. It takes 5 seconds for it to feel pain when under attack.

evolves_to_details.slowking: when traded holding a Kings Rock or using a Galarica Wreath

name: Slowbro
description: The SHELLDER that is latched onto SLOWPOKE's tail is said to feed on the host's left over scraps.

name: Slowking
description: It has incredible intellect and in tuition. Whatever the situation, it remains calm and collected.
evolution_from_requirement: when traded holding a Kings Rock or with a Galarica Wreath

name: Alomomola
description: The special membrane enveloping Alomomola has the ability to heal wounds.

name: Arctovish
description: Though its able to capture prey by freezing its surroundings, it has trouble eating the prey afterward because its mouth is on top of its head.

name: Dracovish
description: Powerful legs and jaws made it the apex predator of its time. Its own overhunting of its prey was what drove it to extinction.

name: Basculin White Striped
description: In the past, it often appeared on the dinner table. The meat of red-striped Basculin is on the fatty side, and it’s more popular with the youth.

name: Basculin Red Striped
description: Red- and blue-striped Basculin are very violent and always fighting. They are also remarkably tasty.

name: Basculin Blue Striped
description: Red- and blue-striped Basculin are very violent and always fighting. They are also remarkably tasty.

name: Basculegion Male
description: Clads itself in the souls of comrades that perished before fulfilling their goals of journeying upstream. No other species throughout all Hisui's rivers is Basculegion's equal.

name: Basculegion Female
description: Clads itself in the souls of comrades that perished before fulfilling their goals of journeying upstream. No other species throughout all Hisui's rivers is Basculegion's equal.

name: Bruxish
description: When it unleashes its psychic power from the protuberance on its head, the grating sound of grinding teeth echoes through the area.

name: Corsola
description: It continuously sheds and grows. The tip of its head is prized as a treasure for its beauty.

name: Dondozo
description: This Pokemon is a glutton, but its bad at getting food. It teams up with a Tatsugiri to catch prey.

name: Lapras
description: A POKeMON that has been over hunted almost to extinction. It can ferry people across the water.

name: Luvdisc
description: LUVDISC live in shallow seas in the tropics. This heart-shaped POKeMON earned its name by swimming after loving couples it spotted in the oceans waves.

name: Pyukumuku
description: It lives in shallow seas, such as areas near a beach. It can eject its internal organs, which it uses to engulf its prey or battle enemies.

name: Qwilfish
description: To fire its poison spikes, it must inflate its body by drinking over 2.6 gallons of water all at once.

name: Qwilfish Dark Waters
description: Fishers detest this troublesome Pokémon because it sprays poison from its spines, getting it everywhere. A different form of Qwilfish lives in other regions.

evolves_to_details.overqwil: after using a move in Strong Style or when leveled up with knowing Barb Barrage or via use move

name: Overqwil
description: Its lancelike spikes and savage temperament have earned it the nickname sea fiend. It slurps up poison to nourish itself.
evolution_from_requirement: after using a move in Strong Style or when leveled up with knowing Barb Barrage or via use move

name: Relicanth
description: RELICANTH is a POKeMON species that existed for a hundred million years without ever changing its form. This ancient POKeMON feeds on microscopic organisms with its toothless mouth.

name: Veluza
description: When Veluza discards unnecessary flesh, its mind becomes honed and its psychic power increases. The spare flesh has a mild but delicious flavor.

name: Wishiwashi Solo
description: When it’s in a jam, its shining eyes attract others of its kind. The light from its eyes is visible almost 25 miles away.

name: Wishiwashi School
description: When it’s in a jam, its shining eyes attract others of its kind. The light from its eyes is visible almost 25 miles away.

name: Human
description: ToDo

name: Type Null
description: It was modeled after a mighty Pokémon of myth. The mask placed upon it limits its power in order to keep it under control.

name: Silvally
description: Its trust in its partner is what awakens it. This Pokemon is capable of changing its type, a flexibility that is well displayed in battle.

name: Magearna
description: This artificial Pokemon, constructed more than 500 years ago, can understand human speech but cannot itself speak.

name: Genesect
description: Over 300 million years ago, it was feared as the strongest of hunters. It has been modified by Team Plasma.

name: Mew
description: So rare that it is still said to be a mirage by many experts. Only a few people have seen it worldwide.

name: Mewtwo
description: It was created by a scientist after years of horrific gene splicing and DNA engineering experiments.

name: Great Tusk Donphan
description: This creature resembles a mysterious Pokémon that, according to a paranormal magazine, has lived since ancient times.

name: Scream Tail Jigglypuff
description: It resembles a mysterious Pokémon described in a paranormal magazine as a Jigglypuff from one billion years ago.

name: Brute Bonnet Amoonguss
description: It bears a slight resemblance to a Pokémon described in a dubious magazine as a cross between a dinosaur and a mushroom.

name: Flutter Mane Misdreavus
description: It has similar features to a ghostly pterosaur that was covered in a paranormal magazine, but the two have little else in common.

name: Slither Wing Volcarona
description: This Pokémon somewhat resembles an ancient form of Volcarona that was introduced in a dubious magazine.

name: Sandy Shocks Magneton
description: It slightly resembles a Magneton that lived for 10,000 years and was featured in an article in a paranormal magazine.

name: Roaring Moon Salamence
description: According to an article in a dubious magazine, this Pokémon has some connection to a phenomenon that occurs in a certain region.

name: Iron Treads Donphan
description: Sightings of this Pokémon have occurred in recent years. It resembles a mysterious object described in an old expedition journal.

name: Iron Bundle Delibird
description: It resembles a mysterious object mentioned in an old book. There are only two reported sightings of this Pokémon.

name: Iron Hands Hariyama
description: This Pokémon shares many similarities with Iron Hands, an object mentioned in a certain expedition journal.

name: Iron Jugulis Hydreigon
description: It’s possible that Iron Jugulis, an object described in an old book, may actually be this Pokémon.

name: Iron Moth Volcarona
description: No records exist of this species being caught. Data is lacking, but the Pokémon’s traits match up with an object described in an old book.

name: Iron Thorns Tyranitar
description: Some of its notable features match those of an object named within a certain expedition journal as Iron Thorns.

name: Iron Valiant Gallade
description: It’s possible that this is the object listed as Iron Valiant in a certain expedition journal.

name: Nihilego
description: One of several mysterious Ultra Beasts. People on the street report observing those infested by it suddenly becoming violent.

name: Buzzwole
description: This Ultra Beast appeared from another world. It shows off its body, but whether that display is a boast or a threat remains unclear.

name: Pheromosa
description: One of the dangerous Ultra Beasts, it has been spotted running across the land at terrific speeds.

name: Xurkitree
description: One of the mysterious life-forms known as Ultra Beasts. Astonishing electric shocks emanate from its entire body, according to witnesses.

name: Celesteela
description: It appeared from the Ultra Wormhole. Witnesses observed it flying across the sky at high speed.

name: Kartana
description: This Ultra Beast came from the Ultra Wormhole. It seems not to attack enemies on its own, but its sharp body is a dangerous weapon in itself.

name: Guzzlord
description: It has gobbled mountains and swallowed whole buildings, according to reports. Its one of the Ultra Beasts.

name: Stakataka
description: It appeared from an Ultra Wormhole. Each one appears to be made up of many life-forms stacked one on top of each other.

name: Blacephalon
description: It slithers toward people. Then, without warning, it triggers the explosion of its own head. Its apparently one kind of Ultra Beast.

name: Poipole
description: This Ultra Beast is well enough liked to be chosen as a first partner in its own world.

name: Naganadel
description: It stores hundreds of liters of poisonous liquid inside its body. It is one of the organisms known as UBs.

name: Articuno
description: A legendary bird POKeMON that is said to appear to doomed people who are lost in icy mountains.

name: Articuno Remote Isles
description: This Pokémon can control ice at will. Articuno is said to live in snowy mountains riddled with permafrost.

name: Zapdos
description: A legendary bird POKeMON that is said to appear from clouds while dropping enormous lightning bolts.

name: Zapdos Remote Isles
description: Zapdos is a legendary bird Pokémon. It’s said that when Zapdos rubs its feathers together, lightning will fall immediately after.

name: Moltres
description: Known as the legendary bird of fire. Every flap of its wings creates a dazzling flash of flames.

name: Moltres Remote Isles
description: There are stories of this Pokémon using its radiant, flame-cloaked wings to light up paths for those lost in the mountains.

name: Raikou
description: The rain clouds it carries let it fire thunderbolts at will. They say that it descended with lightning.

name: Entei
description: Volcanoes erupt when it barks. Un able to restrain its extreme power, it races headlong around the land.

name: Suicune
description: Said to be the reincarnation of north winds, it can instantly purify filthy, murky water.

name: Tapu Koko
description: ToDo

name: Tapu Lele
description: ToDo

name: Tapu Bulu
description: ToDo

name: Tapu Fini
description: ToDo

name: Wo Chien
description: ToDo

name: Chien Pao
description: ToDo

name: Ting Lu
description: ToDo

name: Chi Yu
description: ToDo

name: Cobalion
description: This legendary Pokemon battled against humans to protect Pokemon. Its personality is calm and composed.

name: Terrakion
description: This Pokemon came to the defense of Pokemon that had lost their homes in a war among humans.

name: Virizion
description: This Pokemon fought humans in order to protect its friends. Legends about it continue to be passed down.

name: Keldeo
description: By blasting water from its hooves, it can glide across water. It excels at using leg moves while battling.

name: Tornadus Incarnate
description: In every direction it flies, creating winds so powerful, they blow everything away.

name: Tornadus Therian
description: In every direction it flies, creating winds so powerful, they blow everything away.

name: Thundurus Incarnate
description: As it flies around, it shoots lightning all over the place and causes forest fires. It is therefore disliked.

name: Thundurus Therian
description: As it flies around, it shoots lightning all over the place and causes forest fires. It is therefore disliked.

name: Landorus Incarnate
description: From the forces of lightning and wind, it creates energy to give nutrients to the soil and make the land abundant.

name: Landorus Therian
description: From the forces of lightning and wind, it creates energy to give nutrients to the soil and make the land abundant.

name: Enamorus Incarnate
description: When it flies to this land from across the sea, the bitter winter comes to an end. According to legend, this Pokémon's love gives rise to the budding of fresh life across Hisui.

name: Enamorus Therian
description: When it flies to this land from across the sea, the bitter winter comes to an end. According to legend, this Pokémon's love gives rise to the budding of fresh life across Hisui.

name: Latias
description: LATIAS is highly sensitive to the emotions of people. If it senses any hostility, this POKeMON ruffles the feathers all over its body and cries shrilly to intimidate the foe.

name: Latios
description: LATIOS has the ability to make its foe see an image of what it has seen or imagines in its head. This POKeMON is intelligent and understands human speech.

name: Regirock
description: REGIROCK was sealed away by people long ago. If this POKeMONs body is damaged in battle, it is said to seek out suitable rocks on its own to repair itself.

name: Regice
description: REGICEs body was made during an ice age. The deep-frozen body cant be melted, even by fire. This POKeMON controls frigid air of minus 328 degrees F.

name: Registeel
description: REGISTEEL has a body that is harder than any kind of metal. Its body is apparently hollow. No one has any idea what this POKeMON eats.

name: Regieleki
description: This Pokemon is a cluster of electrical energy. Its said that removing the rings on Regielekis body will unleash the Pokemons latent power.

name: Regidrago
description: An academic theory proposes that Regidragos arms were once the head of an ancient dragon Pokemon. The theory remains unproven.

name: Regigigas
description: There is an enduring legend that states this Pokemon towed continents with ropes.

name: Uxie
description: Known as The Being of Knowledge. It is said that it can wipe out the memory of those who see its eyes.

name: Mesprit
description: Known as The Being of Emotion. It taught humans the nobility of sorrow, pain, and joy.

name: Azelf
description: Known as The Being of Willpower. It sleeps at the bottom of a lake to keep the world in balance.

name: Heatran
description: It dwells in volcanic caves. It digs in with its cross-shaped feet to crawl on ceilings and walls.

name: Volcanion
description: It lets out billows of steam and disappears into the dense fog. Its said to live in mountains where humans do not tread.

name: Lugia
description: It is said that it quietly spends its time deep at the bottom of the sea because its powers are too strong.

name: Ho Oh
description: ToDo

name: Okidogi
description: After all its muscles were stimulated by the toxic chain around its neck, Okidogi transformed and gained a powerful physique.

name: Munkidori
description: The chain is made from toxins that enhance capabilities. It stimulated Munkidori's brain and caused the Pokemon's psychic powers to bloom.

name: Fezandipiti
description: Fezandipiti owes its beautiful looks and lovely voice to the toxic stimulants emanating from the chain wrapped around its body.

name: Pecharunt
description: It feeds others toxic mochi that draw out desires and capabilities. Those who eat the mochi fall under Pecharunts control, chained to its will.

name: Ogerpon Teal Mask
description: This mischief-loving Pokémon is full of curiosity. It battles by drawing out the type-based energy contained within its masks.

name: Ogerpon Wellspring Mask
description: This mischief-loving Pokémon is full of curiosity. It battles by drawing out the type-based energy contained within its masks.

name: Ogerpon Hearthflame Mask
description: This mischief-loving Pokémon is full of curiosity. It battles by drawing out the type-based energy contained within its masks.

name: Ogerpon Cornerstone Mask
description: This mischief-loving Pokémon is full of curiosity. It battles by drawing out the type-based energy contained within its masks.

name: Terapagos
description: Terapagos protects itself using its power to transform energy into hard crystals. This Pokemon is the source of the Terastal phenomenon.

name: Terapagos Tera Form
description: It’s thought that this Pokémon lived in ancient Paldea until it got caught in seismic shifts and went extinct.

name: Terapagos Stellar Form
description: It’s thought that this Pokémon lived in ancient Paldea until it got caught in seismic shifts and went extinct.

name: Phione
description: A Pokemon that lives in warm seas. It inflates the flotation sac on its head to drift and search for food.

name: Manaphy
description: Born on a cold seafloor, it will swim great distances to return to its birthplace.

name: Celebi
description: This POKeMON wan ders across time. Grass and trees flourish in the forests in which it has appeared.

name: Jirachi
description: A legend states that JIRACHI will make true any wish that is written on notes attached to its head when it awakens. If this POKeMON senses danger, it will fight without awakening.

name: Victini
description: This Pokemon brings victory. It is said that Trainers with Victini always win, regardless of the type of encounter.

name: Marshadow
description: Able to conceal itself in shadows, it never appears before humans, so its very existence was the stuff of myth.

name: Shaymin Land
description: The blooming of Gracidea flowers confers the power of flight upon it. Feelings of gratitude are the message it delivers.

name: Shaymin Sky
description: The blooming of Gracidea flowers confers the power of flight upon it. Feelings of gratitude are the message it delivers.

name: Walking Wake Suicune
description: It resembles an illustration published in a paranormal magazine, said to be a depiction of a super-ancient Suicune.

name: Gouging Fire Entei
description: It resembles an eerie Pokémon once shown in a paranormal magazine. That Pokémon was said to be an Entei regenerated from a fossil.

name: Raging Bolt Raikou
description: It bears resemblance to a Pokémon that became a hot topic for a short while after a paranormal magazine touted it as Raikou's ancestor.

name: Iron Leaves Virizion
description: According to the few eyewitness accounts that exist, it used its shining blades to julienne large trees and boulders.

name: Iron Boulder Terrakion
description: It was named after a mysterious object recorded in an old book. Its body seems to be metallic.

name: Iron Crown Cobalion
description: There was supposedly an incident in which it launched shining blades to cut everything around it to pieces. Little else is known about it.

name: Koraidon Winged King
description: This Pokémon resembles Cyclizar, but it is far burlier and more ferocious. Nothing is known about its ecology or other features.

name: Miraidon Iron Serpent
description: This seems to be the Iron Serpent mentioned in an old book. The Iron Serpent is said to have turned the land to ash with its lightning.

name: Glastrier
description: Glastrier emits intense cold from its hooves. Its also a belligerent Pokemonanything it wants, it takes by force.

name: Spectrier
description: It probes its surroundings with all its senses save oneit doesnt use its sense of sight. Spectriers kicks are said to separate soul from body.

name: Calyrex
description: Calyrex is a merciful Pokemon, capable of providing healing and blessings. It reigned over the Galar region in times of yore.

name: Calyrex Ice Rider
description: Calyrex is known in legend as a king that ruled over Galar in ancient times. It has the power to cause hearts to mend and plants to spring forth.

name: Calyrex Shadow Rider
description: Calyrex is known in legend as a king that ruled over Galar in ancient times. It has the power to cause hearts to mend and plants to spring forth.

name: Meloetta Aria
description: The melodies sung by Meloetta have the power to make Pokémon that hear them happy or sad.

name: Meloetta Pirouette
description: The melodies sung by Meloetta have the power to make Pokémon that hear them happy or sad.

name: Diancie
description: A sudden transformation of Carbink, its pink, glimmering body is said to be the loveliest sight in the whole world.

name: Zeraora
description: It electrifies its claws and tears its opponents apart with them. Even if they dodge its attack, theyll be electrocuted by the flying sparks.

name: Zarude
description: Within dense forests, this Pokemon lives in a pack with others of its kind. Its incredibly aggressive, and the other Pokemon of the forest fear it.

name: Kubfu
description: Kubfu trains hard to perfect its moves. The moves it masters will determine which form it takes when it evolves.

evolves_to_details.urshifu-rapid-strike: after training in the Tower of Darkness or after training in the Tower of Waters
evolves_to_details.urshifu-single-strike: after training in the Tower of Darkness or after training in the Tower of Waters

name: Urshifu Single Strike
description: Inhabiting the mountains of a distant region, this Pokémon races across sheer cliffs, training its legs and refining its moves.
evolution_from_requirement: after training in the Tower of Darkness or after training in the Tower of Waters

name: Urshifu Rapid Strike
description: Inhabiting the mountains of a distant region, this Pokémon races across sheer cliffs, training its legs and refining its moves.
evolution_from_requirement: after training in the Tower of Darkness or after training in the Tower of Waters

name: Meltan
description: It melts particles of iron and other metals found in the subsoil, so it can absorb them into its body of molten steel.

name: Melmetal
description: Revered long ago for its capacity to create iron from nothing, for some reason it has come back to life after 3,000 years.

name: Hoopa
description: This troublemaker sends anything and everything to faraway places using its loop, which can warp space.

name: Hoopa Unbound
description: It is said to be able to seize anything it desires with its six rings and six huge arms. With its power sealed, it is transformed into a much smaller form.

name: Deoxys Balance
description: Deoxys emerged from a virus that came from space. It is highly intelligent and wields psychokinetic powers. This Pokémon shoots lasers from the crystalline organ on its chest.

name: Deoxys Attack
description: Deoxys emerged from a virus that came from space. It is highly intelligent and wields psychokinetic powers. This Pokémon shoots lasers from the crystalline organ on its chest.

name: Deoxys Defense
description: Deoxys emerged from a virus that came from space. It is highly intelligent and wields psychokinetic powers. This Pokémon shoots lasers from the crystalline organ on its chest.

name: Deoxys Speed
description: Deoxys emerged from a virus that came from space. It is highly intelligent and wields psychokinetic powers. This Pokémon shoots lasers from the crystalline organ on its chest.

name: Darkrai
description: It can lull people to sleep and make them dream. It is active during nights of the new moon.

name: Cresselia
description: Shiny particles are released from its wings like a veil. It is said to represent the crescent moon.

name: Zacian
description: Known as a legendary hero, this Pokemon absorbs metal particles, transforming them into a weapon it uses to battle.

name: Zacian Crowned Sword
description: This Pokémon has slumbered for many years. Some say it’s Zamazenta’s elder sister—others say the two Pokémon are rivals.

name: Zamazenta
description: In times past, it worked together with a king of the people to save the Galar region. It absorbs metal that it then uses in battle.

name: Zamazenta Crowned Shield
description: This Pokémon slept for aeons while in the form of a statue. It was asleep for so long, people forgot that it ever existed.

name: Cosmog
description: Its body is gaseous and frail. It slowly grows as it collects dust from the atmosphere.

name: Cosmoem
description: Motionless as if dead, its body is faintly warm to the touch. In the distant past, it was called the cocoon of the stars.

name: Solgaleo
description: It is said to live in another world. The intense light it radiates from the surface of its body can make the darkest of nights light up like midday.

name: Lunala
description: It is said to be a female evolution of Cosmog. When its third eye activates, away it flies to another world.

name: Necrozma
description: Reminiscent of the Ultra Beasts, this life-form, apparently asleep underground, is thought to have come from another world in ancient times.

name: Necrozma Dusk Mane
description: It needs light to survive, and it goes on a rampage seeking it out. Its laser beams will cut anything to pieces.

name: Necrozma Dawn Wings
description: It needs light to survive, and it goes on a rampage seeking it out. Its laser beams will cut anything to pieces.

name: Necrozma Ultra Mantle
description: It needs light to survive, and it goes on a rampage seeking it out. Its laser beams will cut anything to pieces.

name: Kyogre
description: KYOGRE has the power to create massive rain clouds that cover the entire sky and bring about torrential downpours. This POKeMON saved people who were suffering from droughts.

name: Kyogre Primal Reversion
description: Kyogre is said to be the personification of the sea itself. Legends tell of its many clashes against Groudon, as each sought to gain the power of nature.

name: Groudon
description: GROUDON has long been described in mythology as the POKeMON that raised lands and expanded continents. This POKeMON took to sleep after a cataclysmic battle with KYOGRE.

name: Groudon Primal Reversion
description: Through Primal Reversion and with nature’s full power, it will take back its true form. It can cause magma to erupt and expand the landmass of the world.

name: Rayquaza
description: RAYQUAZA lived for hundreds of millions of years in the earths ozone layer, never descending to the ground. This POKeMON appears to feed on water and particles in the atmosphere.

name: Reshiram
description: This Pokemon appears in legends. It sends flames into the air from its tail, burning up everything around it.

name: Zekrom
description: Concealing itself in lightning clouds, it flies throughout the Unova region. It creates electricity in its tail.

name: Kyurem
description: It can produce ultracold air. Its body is frozen.

name: Kyurem Black Fusion
description: This legendary ice Pokémon waits for a hero to fill in the missing parts of its body with truth or ideals.

name: Kyurem White Fusion
description: This legendary ice Pokémon waits for a hero to fill in the missing parts of its body with truth or ideals.

name: Xerneas
description: Legends say it can share eternal life. It slept for a thousand years in the form of a tree before its revival.

name: Yveltal
description: When this legendary Pokemons wings and tail feathers spread wide and glow red, it absorbs the life force of living creatures.

name: Zygarde 10
description: It’s hypothesized that it’s monitoring those who destroy the ecosystem from deep in the cave where it lives.

name: Zygarde 50
description: It’s hypothesized that it’s monitoring those who destroy the ecosystem from deep in the cave where it lives.

name: Zygarde Complete
description: It’s hypothesized that it’s monitoring those who destroy the ecosystem from deep in the cave where it lives.

name: Dialga Altered Form
description: This Pokémon completely controls the flow of time. It uses its power to travel at will through the past and future.

name: Dialga Origin Form
description: This Pokémon completely controls the flow of time. It uses its power to travel at will through the past and future.

name: Palkia Altered Form
description: Its total control over the boundaries of space enable it to transport itself to faraway places or even other dimensions.

name: Palkia Origin Form
description: Its total control over the boundaries of space enable it to transport itself to faraway places or even other dimensions.

name: Giratina Origin Form
description: This Pokémon is said to live in a world on the reverse side of ours, where common knowledge is distorted and strange.

name: Giratina Altered Form
description: This Pokémon is said to live in a world on the reverse side of ours, where common knowledge is distorted and strange.

name: Eternatus
description: The core on its chest absorbs energy emanating from the lands of the Galar region. This energy is what allows Eternatus to stay active.

name: Eternatus Eternamax
description: It was inside a meteorite that fell 20,000 years ago. There seems to be a connection between this Pokémon and the Dynamax phenomenon.

name: Arceus
description: It is described in mythology as the Pokemon that shaped the universe with its 1,000 arms.
